description: Three improvements: (1) Enable SenseVoice built-in punctuation via use_itn=True. (2) Add fallback to alternative Gemini model on 429. (3) Switch Vertex AI to global endpoint to reduce 429 frequency.

userStories.title: Switch Vertex AI from regional to global endpoint
userStories.description: Change vertex_proxy.py location from 'us-central1' to 'global'. Global endpoint auto-routes to regions with available capacity, reducing 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED errors. Free trial accounts are stuck in Tier 0 with low TPM baseline, and us-central1 is a high-contention region. Global endpoint alleviates both issues.
acceptanceCriteria: vertex_proxy.py: genai.Client() location parameter changed from 'us-central1' to 'global'
post_processor_presets.py: gemini-fix and gemini-merge presets vertex_region changed from 'us-central1' to 'global'
The region value must come from stdin_data JSON (vertex_proxy.py reads 'region' field), so presets control it
Unit test: verify gemini-fix preset has vertex_region='global'
Unit test: verify gemini-merge preset has vertex_region='global'
Existing tests pass unchanged
E2E test: run voice-e2e-test skill (short 8s audio) to verify Vertex AI still works with global endpoint
Tests pass

userStories.title: Enable SenseVoice built-in punctuation with use_itn=True
userStories.description: SenseVoice supports Inverse Text Normalization (ITN) which adds punctuation to output. Currently use_itn defaults to False, so raw ASR output has no punctuation. When Gemini merge times out or fails, the fallback text has no punctuation at all. Enable use_itn=True for SenseVoice to ensure punctuation is always present.
acceptanceCriteria: model_configs.py transcribe_funasr(): sensevoice branch passes use_itn=True to model.generate()
Existing language='zh' parameter preserved alongside use_itn=True
Other FunASR models (fun-asr-nano, paraformer) NOT affected — only sensevoice branch
Unit test: transcribe_funasr with model_id='sensevoice' passes use_itn=True to model.generate()
Unit test: transcribe_funasr with model_id='fun-asr-nano' does NOT pass use_itn
Unit test: transcribe_funasr with other model_ids (paraformer) does NOT pass use_itn
Integration test: mock SenseVoice model.generate() verifies use_itn=True is in kwargs
Existing tests pass unchanged
E2E test: run voice-e2e-test skill (short 8s audio) — daemon must be restarted first
E2E test: run test_e2e_kitty.py --duration 35 (long audio, verifies VAD chunking still works with use_itn)
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add 429 fallback to alternative Gemini model
userStories.description: When _run_vertex_proxy() gets 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED and the retry also fails, try a fallback model (gemini-2.5-flash-lite) before giving up. This reduces the chance of returning raw unpunctuated text to the user.
acceptanceCriteria: _run_vertex_proxy() accepts optional fallback_model parameter (default None)
When retry with same model fails on 429: if fallback_model is set, modify stdin_data JSON to use fallback_model and try once more
Fallback attempt has same timeout as original
Log the fallback attempt: '[TRACE] vertex_proxy fallback to {model}: Xs'
process_with_vertex_ai() passes fallback_model from config.get('fallback_model', None)
process_with_gemini_merge() passes fallback_model from config.get('fallback_model', None)
gemini-fix and gemini-merge presets in post_processor_presets.py get new config field: fallback_model='gemini-2.5-flash-lite'
Unit test: _run_vertex_proxy tries fallback model after 429 retry failure
Unit test: _run_vertex_proxy does NOT try fallback when fallback_model is None
Unit test: _run_vertex_proxy does NOT try fallback on non-429 errors
Unit test: fallback success returns the fallback result
Unit test: fallback failure returns the original failed result
Unit test: verify gemini-fix and gemini-merge presets have fallback_model field
Integration test: mock subprocess to simulate 429 → retry 429 → fallback success flow
Existing tests pass unchanged
E2E test: run voice-e2e-test skill (short 8s audio) to verify normal path unaffected
Tests pass
